title: Is there a Hebrew Forum?
excerpt: Is there a Hebrew forum? if there one ’ how can I join it?

posts.author: etingerd (David Etinger)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a Hebrew forum? if there one ’ how can I join it?

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @etingerd, welcome, and thanks for posting! At the moment there’s not a Hebrew forum, I’m afraid.

Let me know if you have any other questions

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml: Just wanted to follow up here as I discussed this with the team, and they’ve said we may look into adding a Hebrew forum in the future. Would it be helpful to you and others? Feel free to let me know! @etingerd
